{{Quote|I now represent a number of planets—the ''Commonality''—and their votes represent the ''swing votes'' in a badly divided Senate.|[[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]], to [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]|<ref name="Republic 46">[[Republic 46|''Republic'' 46]]</ref>}}
The '''Commonality''' was a confederation of five [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] (including [[Vorzyd sector/Legends|Vorzyd sector]]) during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Description==
This political alliance represented worlds that worked toward a common set of goals and needs during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The Commonality was ruled from the planet [[Columex/Legends|Columex]], which provided access to the five sectors via the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. This political group formed an important collection of swing votes in the badly divided [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

Aside from Columex, [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of the Commonality included [[Hraki]], [[Paigu]], [[Kilmaulsias]], [[Seftek]], [[Vorzyd IV]], and [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]], all located in the [[Vorzyd Cluster]].<ref name="GatORW" />

==History==
The Commonality was initially an alliance made between [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] of the Vorzyd Cluster after the discovery of the cluster by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Draggulch Period]]. Five centuries later, the Vorzyd Cluster attracted [[Commenor/Legends|Commenorian]] investors, including the [[Greyshade family]], who settled on Columex and began trading with the cluster. Columex joined the confederacy and, in a few generations, the aggressive Columexi traders allowed Columex to take control of the entire Commonality. The Commonality was expanded and eventually joined the Republic as a quintet of sectors.<ref name="GatORW" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Commonality was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Jheramahd Greyshade]]. He was later succeeded in office by his cousin, [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]].<ref name="VSV2">{{SW|url=news/viva-space-vegas-the-history-of-the-marvelous-wheel-part-2|series=Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref>

When the Republic [[Declaration of a New Order|fell]], Senator Simon Greyshade declared a state of emergency in the Commonality. Greyshade later agreed to allow the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to seize a part of the Commonality [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] profits in exchange for control of [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], to go to a Columexi company controlled by Greyshade. Simon Greyshade remained senator until the [[Dissolution of the Imperial Senate/Legends|dissolution]] of the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]]. The Commonality was later ruled by a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]],<ref name="GatORW" /> [[Diedrich Greyshade]]<ref name="VSV2" />

The Commonality later refused to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and became independent.<ref name="GatORW" />

Columex was [[Attack on the Columex system|conquered]] and razed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="GatORW" /> The [[Vorzyd system/Legends|Vorzyd system]] was also seized.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
